deals.Description: Develops AI-powered solutions to help power grids manage the increasing demand from data centers, focusing on AI to manage power grid challenges.
deals.Investors: Unknown (Nvidia mentioned backing AI startups in related news)

deals.Description: A Montréal-based manufacturing startup opening autonomous microfactories to make cold-chain products on demand, replacing less environmentally sustainable gel packs.
deals.Round: Seed Extension (also secured 2.5M CAD in equipment financing)
deals.Investors: Desjardins Capital, Waterpoint Lane, RGS Ice, CWV Sustainable Royalties

deals.Description: Ottawa-based AI solutions provider focusing on AI R&D for predictive maintenance, supply chain optimization, and sovereign knowledge management in aerospace and defence sectors.
Edmonton-based aerospace company focused on analytics and data, receiving federal defence funding.
An Artificial Intelligence and B2B Software company.
A company in Music, Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Audio, and B2B Software.
A company specializing in Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, B2B Software, and Data.
A B2B Software company focused on Education and Human Resources.
A B2B Software company leveraging Artificial Intelligence and Cloud Computing.
A Toronto-based payments platform that rewards Canadians for making rent, bill, and tax payments with a credit card. The company is expanding its services to include small-to-medium-sized businesses.
deals.Investors: Khosla Ventures, Crossbeam, Venrex, Air Canada
deals.Founders: Liza Akhvledziani Carew, Ben Gigone, Abtine Monavvari

deals.Description: A Vancouver-based agtech company developing an AI-powered soil intelligence platform. It combines spectroscopy, genomics, and machine learning to provide comprehensive environmental data for agriculture.
deals.Investors: At One Ventures, Farm Credit Canada, S2G Investments, Sitka Foundation, iSelect

deals.Description: A Canadian-led company with headquarters in New York, developing an artificial intelligence platform to support critical infrastructure in achieving energy autonomy. It offers physics-informed AI software to utility providers for modernizing power grid infrastructure and managing data centre demand.
deals.Investors: Energy Impact Partners, NVentures, Edison International, GE Vernova, Powerhouse Ventures, Active Impact Investments, Blackhorn Ventures, Amplify Capital, and an undisclosed North American investor-owned utility.

deals.Description: Spade is a data and AI platform transforming how financial institutions use transaction data, turning messy transaction strings into structured, verified records to power AI initiatives. They provide real-time merchant intelligence for the card ecosystem.
deals.Investors: Oak HC/FT, Andreessen Horowitz, Flourish, Gradient, NAventures (National Bank of Canada's corporate venture arm), Y Combinator
deals.Founders: Oban MacTavish, Tess Bloch, Cooper Hart

deals.Description: Halifax-based SaaS startup providing an operational engine for driving business impact with people data, centralizing feedback, and offering AI insights for organizational learning.
Toronto-based voice platform that uses AI for phone commerce.
deals.Investors: RTP Global, Jason Lemkin's SaaStr Fund, Mu Ventures, founders of Gorgias & others

deals.Description: Toronto-based AI-powered fleet management platform, building an 'AI operating system' for the trucking industry, starting with intelligent fuel management.

A virtual clinic for midlife women, integrating hormonal health, metabolic wellness, and weight management. It uses advanced technology and AI capabilities to provide personalized, evidence-based roadmaps for menopause symptom management, weight loss, and health longevity.
deals.Investors: Brightspark, Diagram, AQC Capital, Anges Quebec, The51, strategic group of angel investors

deals.Description: An award-winning cloud distributor and marketplace that provides value-added services to Managed Service Providers (MSPs). It enables MSPs to offload technical operations, deepen Microsoft cloud expertise, and scale efficiently.
deals.Investors: Investissement Québec, Fonds pour la croissance des entreprises du Québec (FCEQ)

deals.Description: A cleantech company that converts industrial byproducts and captured CO₂ into valuable cement materials, reducing the carbon footprint of cement and concrete.

Soma Energy develops an AI-powered platform that optimizes energy generation, storage, and consumption in real time for data centers and energy users. The platform aims to reduce costs and support the transition to renewable energy.
deals.Investors: Category Ventures, Haystack, Panache Ventures, RRE Ventures, TO.VC, Uncork Capital, Walter Kortschak
deals.Founders: Ath Caramanolis, Mario Souto, Henrique Hoeltgebaum

deals.Description: Aspect Biosystems is a biotechnology company pioneering the development of bioprinted tissue therapeutics. Their full-stack platform integrates AI-powered bioprinting technology and computational design tools.
deals.Founders: Tamer Mohamed, Simon Beyer, Sam Wadsworth

deals.Description: Develops a breakthrough electrochemical technology for storing energy in zinc metal, enabling long-duration, low-cost, and flexible energy storage for a zero-carbon future. The company is participating in an AI adoption program for manufacturers.

Pioneers the application of industrial artificial intelligence (AI) to remake manufacturing processes, empowering industrial robots with AI-driven cognition and awareness. The company is participating in an AI adoption program for manufacturers.

Integrates AI into semiconductor manufacturing for use in advanced data centers, delivering integrated high-speed electronics and optical components on a single semiconductor substrate. The company is participating in an AI adoption program for manufacturers.
Mobile-first AI-powered platform for reproductive health, organizing fragmented health history into a structured format for AI comprehension and human review.
deals.Investors: Graphite Ventures, Conexus Venture Capital, Adrenaline Fund, Phoenix Fire Fund, strategic angel investors

deals.Description: Montréal-based platform that allows users to monetize their video data, providing a marketing strategy for brands. It builds a real-time transaction network for real-world data.
deals.Investors: StandUp Ventures, Version One Ventures, GreenSky Ventures, AQC Capital, Anges Québec

deals.Description: Toronto-based generative AI startup focused on enterprise-grade large language models and agentic AI tailored for enterprise deployments behind corporate firewalls.
deals.Investors: Radical Ventures, Inovia Capital, AMD Ventures, Nvidia, PSP Investments, Salesforce Ventures, and others

deals.Description: A FinTech focused on modernizing the data infrastructure underpinning retirement income solutions.

A leading indoor mapping platform that transforms how venues are experienced, managed, and understood, providing solutions to create, visualize, and maintain maps for malls, stadiums, retail places, and offices using AI-powered tools.
Develops an acoustic sensor with a machine-learning model that mounts to a welding torch to identify and alert welders to errors in real-time.
deals.Investors: Maple VC, Champion Hill Ventures, Dorm Room Fund, undisclosed strategic angel investors
deals.Founders: Hooman Pirouz, Sophia Millar, George Hollo

deals.Description: Toronto-based spacetech company building a network of low-cost satellites to improve real-time communication infrastructure in space. Awarded a contract to lead testing of European Space Agency's high-speed data network.
deals.Founders: Mina Mitry, Jeffrey Osborne, Wen-Yoong Mo

deals.Description: Toronto FinTech firm aiming to make workplace retirement plans easy and affordable.
Toronto-based community event platform that allows hosts to create events for an audience that wants to shift their social life offline.
deals.Investors: N49P, StandUp Ventures, Garage Capital, Zero 21 Partners, Backbone Angels, Good Future, Tobi Lütke

deals.Description: Music startup using AI tools to solve software fragmentation for SMBs.
Medicine Hat-based firm developing technologies that combine artificial intelligence, machine learning, and advanced sensing systems. Aims to expand use of AI and compete in global markets.
AI-focused manufacturing startup developing a system for real-time weld quality monitoring using machine learning and acoustic sensing. Designed to detect weld defects during the welding process.
deals.Investors: Maple VC, Champion Hill Ventures, Dorm Room Fund, angel investors
deals.Founders: Sophia Millar, George Hollo, Hooman Pirouz

deals.Description: Develops quantum sensors for navigation in a post-GPS era, with applications in security and defense.
Cleantech firm developing critical mineral extraction technology.
Provides AI-powered solutions for future workforce and skills development.
Leverages sensors and AI to improve wildfire prediction and prevention on transmission lines.
Provides drone mapping software for wildfire detection and monitoring.
Develops and deploys field-tested technology for wildfire detection, prevention, and management.
A dentistry gig work platform that streamlines administrative tasks for dental clinics. Automates workflows and integrates AI to meet industry demand.
An open-source platform for React Native development, integrating AI into its products. Recently launched an AI agent for coding assistance.
deals.Investors: Georgian, Leadout Capital, A.Capital Ventures, Red Swan Ventures

deals.Description: A&K Robotics builds self-driving 'mobility pods' for airports, utilizing AI to navigate complex and crowded indoor spaces. The company aims to enhance mobility for travelers and scale assistive services.
deals.Investors: BDC Capital's Industrial Innovation Venture Fund, Vantage Futures, RiSC Capital, Grep VC, Nimbus Synergies, Dan Gelbart

deals.Description: ViewsML develops AI models to virtually derive biomarker insights from pathology images, aiming to build the world's first virtual biomarker library. This technology makes it easier for clinicians and scientists to analyze tissue samples.
deals.Investors: Wittington Ventures, Mayo Clinic, and 7 undisclosed investors
deals.Founders: Kenneth To, Rafay Azhar, George Hennen, Christopher Jackson, Keith Jalbert

deals.Description: Biossil is a Toronto-based biotech startup that uses AI to discover new drugs and repurpose failed medicines. The company recently exited stealth mode with significant backing.
Carbonyx is a Vancouver-based carbon removal company that extracts usable materials from mining, construction, or manufacturing waste. Its true mission is to make carbon capture economically viable.
deals.Investors: WUTIF Capital, Spring Impact Capital, UBC Venture Funds, undisclosed angel investors
deals.Founders: Doug Pimlott, Adrien Noble, Mia Stankovic
